name: handoff-for-chatbot-mid-flow
description: User is mid-website-build and changes their mind: 'forget the website, I want a chatbot'. Bot must trigger HUMAN_HANDOFF for chatbot (with switch signal 'forget'), set handoffFiredFor, send admin email-style ack, and NOT keep collecting website fields. Tests the unified turnClassifier's menu-vs-correction-vs-handoff disambiguation.

turns.user: actually scrap the website, I want a chatbot instead
